seoTitle: Devereux Creek vs Devon Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Devereux Creek and Devon Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Devereux Creek vs Devon Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Devereux Creek and Devon Park.
heading: Devereux Creek vs Devon Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Devereux Creek, Queensland and Devon Park, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Devereux Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Devon Park (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Devereux Creek or Devon Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Devereux Creek has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Devon Park scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Devereux Creek scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Devon Park scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Devereux Creek or Devon Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Devereux Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
